voteDescription: **{initiator}** from HR has flagged **{target}** for a mandatory performance review. Please submit your feedback.
votePassedDescription: Following a thorough review, **{target}**'s speaking privileges have been suspended for **{duration} minutes** pending further investigation.
voteExpiredDescription: The performance review of **{target}** has been closed due to insufficient feedback. Only {votes}/{needed} stakeholders responded. Please check your emails.
userMutedDescription: Per company policy Section 4.2.1, **{target}**'s communication access has been revoked for **{duration} minutes**. This decision is final and not subject to appeal at this time.
dmTitle: RE: RE: RE: Your Speaking Privileges
dmDescription:
Dear {target},

Following a comprehensive 360-degree feedback review in **{server}**, your speaking privileges have been suspended for **{duration} minutes**.

Please do not reply to this message.
dmTip: Per the employee handbook, server boosters are eligible for a 1-hour exemption from future reviews. Please see your manager (Nitro store) for details.
unauthorizedUnmuteDescription: **{executor}** has attempted to modify **{target}**'s suspension without proper authorization. This has been escalated to upper management.
selfMuteReactions: The employee has... filed a complaint against themselves? HR is confused but will process it.
Self-evaluation: unsatisfactory. We appreciate the honesty.
Per your own feedback, your performance has been rated 'needs improvement'. Noted.
This is the most productive thing they've done all quarter.
The employee has requested a voluntary leave of absence from chatting. Approved.
footerText: Please submit your feedback below before the deadline
